top_signals.title: FortiBleed leak exposes Fortinet VPN credentials for 73,000 devices.
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered data leak dubbed "FortiBleed" has exposed what appears to be a collection of Fortinet and FortiGate VPN credentials for 73,932 firewall URLs at organizations worldwide. [...]
